overview: Vivify Health & Hormone Optimization Clinic provides personalized hormone optimization, medical weight management, and aesthetic services through a cash-based model. All care is delivered by a licensed nurse practitioner with flexible in-person and telehealth options.
highlights: All services provided by a board-certified nurse practitioner
Transparent, cash-based pricing with unhurried appointments
GLP-1 weight loss, testosterone optimization, peptides, bioidentical hormone therapy, and IV wellness
targetAudience: Women and men seeking personalized hormone optimization, medical weight management, and preventive care.
